featureHelp.bluetooth: Toggles the Bluetooth radio adapter only.
featureHelp.microphone: Shows microphone state; click only repairs access.
featureHelp.screenshot-full: Saves a full-screen screenshot to Pictures.
featureHelp.volume-mixer: Opens the in-app per-application volume mixer.
featureHelp.night-light: Toggles Night light without opening Quick Settings.
featureHelp.battery: Manages battery saver or a power saver plan.
featureHelp.network: Opens the Windows network quick panel.
featureHelp.external-apps: Opens built-in external services from the notch.
